title: CommandCenterUI chat layout: feed must scroll in its own frame
description: Operator feedback: the chat feed grows the whole page, so the composer is only reachable by scrolling to the page bottom and the presence sidebar by scrolling to the top. Root cause: flex/grid children default to min-height:auto, letting .feed content expand .room past the viewport instead of scrolling internally. Fix the CSS so the feed is its own scrollframe with composer and sidebar always visible, and add a reload shortcut (F5/Ctrl+R) to the WebKit window so UI fixes can be picked up without restarting the app.
acceptance_criteria: Composer is always visible at the bottom and the presence sidebar always visible on the left, regardless of feed length; only the message feed scrolls
F5/Ctrl+R reloads the page inside the WebKit window
